Bandwidth (The Pipe): The total capacity to move data over time (e.g., Mbps).
Latency (The Speed of the Signal): The time (ping) it takes for data to travel to a server and back.

Bandwidth (The Pipe): A multi-lane highway that determines how many cars fit.
Latency (The Speed of the Signal): The speed limit and road conditions determining travel time.

Bandwidth (The Pipe): Affects 4K streaming and large file downloads.
Latency (The Speed of the Signal): Affects gaming, "snappiness" of web pages, and IoT response.
